prestazioni: M178 DE 4.0L V8 Biturbo (430–730 HP stock) upgraded with a Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ ECU/TCU flash (targeting 850 HP on 93 octane, 900+ HP on E85) paired with a custom Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.35 A/R, billet compressor wheel) and a full titanium 3.5" downpipe system from Armytrix with 200-cell catalytic converters for backpressure optimization

Full drivetrain reinforcement via an OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.11 final drive ratio) and a Mercedes-AMG Motorsport carbon-fiber driveshaft (20% lighter than OEM), coupled with a Wavetrac ATB differential for torque vectoring under hard acceleration

Suspension overhaul with KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 800 lbs/in front springs, 1000 lbs/in rear springs) and a full set of H&R Monoball subframe bushings (polyurethane, 90A durometer) to eliminate compliance under lateral G-forces, paired with AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers and 400mm carbon-ceramic rotors (CCM-X compound) for fade-free braking
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pandem Designs) with custom carbon-fiber fenders (pre-preg autoclave, 2x2 twill weave) and extended aluminum overfenders (50mm wider front, 70mm wider rear) to accommodate 20x11" ET15 front and 21x12.5" ET5 rear BBS FI-R wheels (gold brushed finish, 5x130 PCD) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 325/25/21 rear)

Full carbon-fiber aero package from Vorsteiner, including a GT-spec front splitter (3D-molded, 3-stage adjustable) with integrated canards, a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (electrically actuated, 0–20mm range), and a fixed carbon-fiber rear wing (dual-element, 1,200mm span, 300mm chord) with adjustable angle of attack (0–15 degrees) for downforce tuning

Custom interior by Sabelt with full FIA-spec 8-point harnesses (6-point lap belts, 2-point anti-submarine) mounted to a Recaro Pole Position seat (carbon-Kevlar shell, 1.2kg weight reduction per seat), paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (suede, 350mm diameter, quick-release hub) and a custom roll cage (T45 steel, 3.2mm wall thickness) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360, 4kg Novec 1230 agent)
